question_text: Which of the following best describes what weight is?

options.label: A
options.text: The amount of matter in an object

options.label: B
options.text: The gravitational force acting on an object

options.label: C
options.text: How heavy an object feels when you hold it

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which an object falls

explanation: Weight is the gravitational force pulling on an object, usually measured in newtons (N). Option A describes mass, option C is vague, and option D describes acceleration—only option B correctly defines weight as a force.
